evidence_text: Bristol Myers Squibb purchased Karuna Therapeutics in a strategic acquisition.
AstraZeneca partnered with Daiichi Sankyo to co-develop oncology therapies.
Novartis worked with Alnylam on RNA interference delivery systems.
10X GENOMICS SWEDEN AB licensed imaging technology from NanoString.
Sarepta Therapeutics merged with Example Rare Disease Co.
CRISPR Therapeutics collaborated with Vertex Pharmaceuticals on gene editing.
J&J worked with Johnson and Johnson Innovative Medicine on an antibody study.
Roche entered into a collaboration with Recursion Pharmaceuticals.
Biogen licensed a neurodegeneration program from Stoke Therapeutics.
GSK partnered with CureVac on next-generation mRNA vaccines.
University of Pennsylvania licensed technology to Spark Therapeutics.
